title: teucrium lusitanicum subsp. lusitanicum
intro: Teucrium lusitanicum subsp. lusitanicum, also known as Lusitanian germander, is a subspecies of a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Teucrium lusitanicum subsp. lusitanicum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), improve gut health, and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Teucrium lusitanicum subsp. lusitanicum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
